description_long: This object consists of two standard traffic cones, each featuring a conical shape with a wide, square base for stability. The cones are primarily orange with broad white horizontal stripes, and both show visible signs of dirt, scuffing, and wear, suggesting extended outdoor use. The surface of the cones appears to be made of flexible plastic or rubber, with a matte, slightly rough finish. The tips of the cones are hollow and circular, typical for stackable traffic cones. The bases are flat, thick, and slightly beveled at the edges, providing a sturdy foundation to prevent tipping. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cones.
description: A pair of orange traffic cones with white stripes, showing visible dirt and wear. Each cone has a hollow tip and a wide, square base for stability.
description_view_0: Two traffic cones side by side, showing their orange color, white stripes, and square bases with visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the hollow tips and the dirtier, more worn white stripes on the cones' backs.
description_view_2: Front view of both cones, clearly displaying the alternating orange and white stripes and the broad, flat bases.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the hollow tips and the scuffed, dirty appearance of the cones' surfaces and bases.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has two wide, horizontal white stripes encircling the cone, positioned near the middle and upper third. The stripes are approximately equal in width and are likely intended to be reflective.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is hollow, circular, and slightly rounded, matching the orange color of the cone with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and thick, made of the same material as the cone, with beveled edges for stability and visible dirt and scuff marks.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cones.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and faded areas, indicating extended outdoor use.
